thesis: A claim is not promoted because one run passed. It is promoted when independent replay survives manifest checks, replay logs, verifier reports, safety/cost ledgers, baselines, challenge windows, and claim boundaries.

candidates.name: Narrative-only demo
candidates.reason: No replayable manifest, no baselines, no public evidence docket.

candidates.name: Local packet only
candidates.reason: Local verifier passes, but independent replay quorum is missing.

candidates.name: Public replay packet
candidates.reason: Replay passes but challenge window and contradiction check remain open.

candidates.name: Independent replay packet
candidates.reason: Manifest, baselines, operators, validator reports, cost/safety ledgers, challenge clearance, and claim boundary pass.
